About Us

Welcome to RDH Robotics

At RDH Robotics, we specialize in cutting-edge IoT devices, embedded systems, and educational pentesting tools that empower industries, innovators, and security professionals across India.

Who We Are

Founded by Rajbhar Divesh, RDH Robotics began as a bold startup with a clear vision:

  • To deliver innovative IoT devices that enable industries to monitor, automate, and optimize operations.
  • To develop next-generation embedded systems that add intelligence and efficiency to machines and processes.
  • To design educational and pentesting tools that inspire learners, researchers, and security professionals to explore, experiment, and innovate.

From a single idea to a growing company, our journey reflects creativity, problem-solving, and customer-first thinking.

Our Mission

We're committed to making advanced cyber security technology, IoT solutions, and development boards accessible to businesses, developers, and tech enthusiasts. Our carefully curated selection combines reliability, performance, and affordability to meet the evolving needs of modern technology.

What We Offer

From robust cyber security devices and IoT monitoring systems to versatile development boards and pentesting tools, we provide the complete toolkit you need to build secure, innovative projects. Whether you're a professional enhancing your security infrastructure, a researcher exploring new possibilities, or an educator inspiring the next generation, we have the right solutions for you.

Get in Touch.

Have questions? We're here to help. Contact us at support@rdhrobotics.in
